codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves all blocking failures from the three prior failed features after reviewing related diffs: theme-toggle (4e6a047), amount-warning-cache-text (81afbc6), cross-area-polish-flows (5fc7281), and the fix commit (1f7a8d8). Light-mode result card vars are now light values, amount warning logic now uses non-empty trimmed input and is recomputed after URL prefill, deletion cascade now uses pre-deletion provenance and no longer treats missing token index entries as proof, light-mode --text-muted is #999, and countAllEnabledTokens() was removed.

issues.description: Hardcoded `color: white;` declarations remain in multiple places (e.g., lines 505, 521, 646, 664, 838, 1025) rather than CSS variables. This was previously non-blocking and is not part of this fix feature's required six findings.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill's required context-read list appears stricter than actual execution for focused UI fix work; transcript evidence shows successful completion without reading all files listed as required.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill step 2 requires reading static/index.html, src/server.py, nginx.conf, .factory/library/tokenlist-format.md, and .factory/library/architecture.md. Transcript skeleton for worker session eb60bef5-1bf1-4bb7-802c-a4ff8d021622 shows reads of static/js/app.js and static/css/style.css, but not those additional files, while handoff still reports followedProcedure=true.

summary: PASS. This fix adequately addresses all blocking failures from theme-toggle, amount-warning-cache-text, and cross-area-polish-flows by correcting light-mode result variables, amount-warning visibility behavior (including URL-prefill recomputation), and deletion-cascade provenance logic, while also implementing the additional requested text-muted and dead-code cleanups. One prior non-blocking theming consistency item (hardcoded white color declarations) remains but does not block acceptance of this fix feature.
